revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:44:39 on [[Template:Angle bracket]]
use Unicode angle brackets (U+27E8 ... U+27E9) instead of math code
change to named HTML entities so TOCs work again, also uses {{unicode}}, see Talk

&#x27E8; &#x27E9; instead of &lang; &rang; mapped to deprecated &#x2329; &#x232A; (normalized to Fullwidth &#x3008; &#x3009;) in XHTML 1.0 and therefore by some browsers, HTML5 maps them to &#x27E8; &#x27E9;
temporary change, to see if this solves the problem of being unable to edit articles like English Braille that have many transclusions of this template
reduce further

revision.text: ⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}
⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}

revision.comment: No hardcoded fonts!
Switching to &#x27E8 (⟨) and &#x27E9 (⟩) to avoid broken pre-conversion to deprecated characters and follow HTML5 recomendation.
Unicode no longer functional
replaced with alternate angle brackets which shows chars in some pcs which you show boxes or ?s
Add TfM tag missing for ten days
Fix day
Fix template duplication
/* top */ Corrected link to TfD discussion
Please link to the proper section
Oops
/* top */ removing merger template from transclusions; perhaps this is overly bold, but this fixes the problem mentioned in [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 August 9#Template:Braket]]
It is not permitted in the instructions for listing a template to noinclude the tag, except in a case (substitution) that does not apply.
Removal accidental angle bracket I left in by mistake
Adding {{pp-template}} ([[WP:TW|TW]])
wrap tfm dated in noinclude
TFD closed as While the result appears the same, these two templates are used for very different purposes. (using [[User:Evad37/TFDcloser|TFDcloser]])
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Angle bracket#Requested move 27 April 2019 |Template talk:Angle bracket]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Angbr|2=Template talk:Angle bracket#Requested move 27 April 2019 }}
</noinclude>⟨{{{1|}}}⟩<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing notice of move discussion
nowrap
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:55:03 on [[Template:Angle bracket]]
use Unicode angle brackets (U+27E8 ... U+27E9) instead of math code
Undid revision 582070179 by [[Special:Contributions/198.12.66.74|198.12.66.74]] ([[User talk:198.12.66.74|talk]])
change to named HTML entities so TOCs work again, also uses {{unicode}}, see Talk

&#x27E8; &#x27E9; instead of &lang; &rang; mapped to deprecated &#x2329; &#x232A; (normalized to Fullwidth &#x3008; &#x3009;) in XHTML 1.0 and therefore by some browsers, HTML5 maps them to &#x27E8; &#x27E9;
temporary change, to see if this solves the problem of being unable to edit articles like English Braille that have many transclusions of this template
reduce further

revision.text: ⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}
⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Switching to &#x27E8 (⟨) and &#x27E9 (⟩) to avoid broken pre-conversion to deprecated characters and follow HTML5 recomendation.
Reverted revision 628345203 by [[User:Edokter|Edokter]], which causes box characters to show for some users (I'm Win 7 / Chrome), which defeats the point of this template!
You seem to contradict yourself on talk; if these *do* show correctly on your system, then let them be.
Unicode no longer functional
replaced with alternate angle brackets which shows chars in some pcs which you show boxes or ?s
Add TfM tag missing for ten days
Fix day
Fix template duplication
/* top */ Corrected link to TfD discussion
Please link to the proper section
Oops
/* top */ removing merger template from transclusions; perhaps this is overly bold, but this fixes the problem mentioned in [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 August 9#Template:Braket]]
rv; The only time in which noincluding the tfm template is suggested in the [[WP:TFD#Listing a template|instructions]] is when the template is substituted, which this one clearly isn't
Undid revision 735393464 by [[Special:Contributions/Pppery|Pppery]] ([[User talk:Pppery|talk]]) preventing severe disruption to phonology tables per [[WP:IAR]]
It is not permitted in the instructions for listing a template to noinclude the tag, except in a case (substitution) that does not apply.
Removal accidental angle bracket I left in by mistake
Adding {{pp-template}} ([[WP:TW|TW]])
wrap tfm dated in noinclude
TFD closed as While the result appears the same, these two templates are used for very different purposes. (using [[User:Evad37/TFDcloser|TFDcloser]])
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Angle bracket#Requested move 27 April 2019 |Template talk:Angle bracket]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Angbr|2=Template talk:Angle bracket#Requested move 27 April 2019 }}
</noinclude>⟨{{{1|}}}⟩<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:00:51 on [[Template:Angle bracket]]
use Unicode angle brackets (U+27E8 ... U+27E9) instead of math code
change to named HTML entities so TOCs work again, also uses {{unicode}}, see Talk

&#x27E8; &#x27E9; instead of &lang; &rang; mapped to deprecated &#x2329; &#x232A; (normalized to Fullwidth &#x3008; &#x3009;) in XHTML 1.0 and therefore by some browsers, HTML5 maps them to &#x27E8; &#x27E9;
Undid revision 582518814 by [[Special:Contributions/Moyogo|Moyogo]] ([[User talk:Moyogo|talk]]) 1. not untalked. 2. doesn't work for me
temporary change, to see if this solves the problem of being unable to edit articles like English Braille that have many transclusions of this template
reduce further

It is not permitted in the instructions for listing a template to noinclude the tag, except in a case (substitution) that does not apply.

wrap tfm dated in noinclude

revision.comment: nowrap
31 revisions imported
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:07:42 on [[Template:Angle bracket]]
use Unicode angle brackets (U+27E8 ... U+27E9) instead of math code
change to named HTML entities so TOCs work again, also uses {{unicode}}, see Talk

&#x27E8; &#x27E9; instead of &lang; &rang; mapped to deprecated &#x2329; &#x232A; (normalized to Fullwidth &#x3008; &#x3009;) in XHTML 1.0 and therefore by some browsers, HTML5 maps them to &#x27E8; &#x27E9;
temporary change, to see if this solves the problem of being unable to edit articles like English Braille that have many transclusions of this template
reduce further

revision.text: ⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}
⟨{{{1|}}}⟩ {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Switching to &#x27E8 (⟨) and &#x27E9 (⟩) to avoid broken pre-conversion to deprecated characters and follow HTML5 recomendation.
Reverted revision 628345203 by [[User:Edokter|Edokter]], which causes box characters to show for some users (I'm Win 7 / Chrome), which defeats the point of this template!
You seem to contradict yourself on talk; if these *do* show correctly on your system, then let them be.
Unicode no longer functional
replaced with alternate angle brackets which shows chars in some pcs which you show boxes or ?s
Add TfM tag missing for ten days
Fix day
Fix template duplication
/* top */ Corrected link to TfD discussion
Please link to the proper section
Oops
/* top */ removing merger template from transclusions; perhaps this is overly bold, but this fixes the problem mentioned in [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 August 9#Template:Braket]]
It is not permitted in the instructions for listing a template to noinclude the tag, except in a case (substitution) that does not apply.
Removal accidental angle bracket I left in by mistake

Changed protection level of Template:Angle bracket: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Adding {{pp-template}} ([[WP:TW|TW]])
wrap tfm dated in noinclude
TFD closed as While the result appears the same, these two templates are used for very different purposes. (using [[User:Evad37/TFDcloser|TFDcloser]])
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Angle bracket#Requested move 27 April 2019 |Template talk:Angle bracket]]

revision.comment: nowrap
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:13:33 on [[Template:Angle bracket]]
use Unicode angle brackets (U+27E8 ... U+27E9) instead of math code
change to named HTML entities so TOCs work again, also uses {{unicode}}, see Talk

&#x27E8; &#x27E9; instead of &lang; &rang; mapped to deprecated &#x2329; &#x232A; (normalized to Fullwidth &#x3008; &#x3009;) in XHTML 1.0 and therefore by some browsers, HTML5 maps them to &#x27E8; &#x27E9;
temporary change, to see if this solves the problem of being unable to edit articles like English Braille that have many transclusions of this template
reduce further
rv: not helping w server load (if that's even the issue)

revision.comment: nowrap
31 revisions imported
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{nowrap|⟨{{{1|}}}⟩}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:qq]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
nowrap
1 revision imported: overwriting
nowrap
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Angle_bracket here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
